# Habitat Speech Therapy
> In-home pediatric speech and language therapy serving Palm Beach County, Florida.

## About
Habitat Speech Therapy is a private practice offering concierge-level, in-home pediatric speech and language therapy in Palm Beach County, Florida. The practice is founded and led by Athena, a licensed speech-language pathologist with over a decade of clinical experience working with children in New York, California, and Florida.

The practice operates as an elevated alternative - or supplement - to traditional clinic or school-based speech therapy. Sessions are held in the child's home, allowing therapy to be woven into familiar routines and environments. Services are also available at participating private schools and daycare programs.

## Therapist
- Name: Athena
- Title: Speech-Language Pathologist (SLP)
- Credentials: M.S. Communication Science and Disorders (New York University), M.S. Human Factors, Certificate of Clinical Competency (CCC-SLP), ASHA member in good standing, Florida state licensed SLP, PROMPT Level 1 certified
- Experience: 10+ years, spanning Pre-K through 12th grade settings, early intervention (Southern California), and private in-home practice (Palm Beach County, FL)

## Services
- Speech and Language Evaluations - comprehensive assessments for children of all ages
- Early Intervention Toddler Speech Therapy - for children ages 18 months to 3 years with developmental delays or disabilities
- Articulation and Speech Sound Therapy - improving speech clarity for children with speech delays or disorders; PROMPT-certified for apraxia of speech
- Receptive and Expressive Language Therapy - building understanding (following directions, comprehending questions) and expression (vocabulary, grammar, sentence structure)
- Social Communication - pragmatic therapy targeting social skills and peer interaction
- Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) - individualized therapy building functional communication and social language for children on the autism spectrum
- Augmentative and Alternative Communication (AAC) - supporting children with limited verbal speech through picture boards, speech-generating devices, and other AAC systems
- Parent Education and Counseling - equipping families with strategies to support communication development at home between sessions

## Service Area
Habitat Speech Therapy serves families throughout Palm Beach County, Florida, including:
Boca Raton, Boynton Beach, Delray Beach, Lake Worth Beach, West Palm Beach, Wellington, Palm Beach Gardens, and Jupiter.

## Contact
- Email: athena@habitatspeechtherapy.com
- Phone / Text: (714) 868-6011
- Website: https://www.habitatspeechtherapy.com

## Common Questions
Q: Do you offer in-home speech therapy in Palm Beach County?
A: Yes. Habitat Speech Therapy provides in-home pediatric speech and language therapy throughout Palm Beach County, Florida.

Q: What ages do you work with?
A: Children from 18 months through school age. Early intervention services are specifically designed for toddlers ages 18 months to 3 years.

Q: What is PROMPT therapy?
A: PROMPT (Prompts for Restructuring Oral Muscular Phonetic Targets) is a specialized approach for childhood apraxia of speech and complex articulation disorders. Athena holds a PROMPT Level 1 certification.

Q: How do I get started?
A: Reach out by email at athena@habitatspeechtherapy.com or text (714) 868-6011 to start a no-pressure conversation about your child's needs.
